title: Galangal Pasta Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and aromatic pasta dish made with galangal and a hint of garlic. This quick and easy recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the garlicky oil over medium-high heat.
Add the grated galangal and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the aerated flour and stir to combine, cooking for an additional minute.
Gradually add in the grated dutch cheese, stirring constantly until smooth.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the galangal sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
